name: 1611 Golf Club
about: 1611 Golf Club is an indoor golf venue combining country club ambiance with a sports bar social atmosphere. It offers Trackman technology, a full bar, and a craft kitchen. The venue is designed for both golf practice and social events, featuring wall-to-wall TVs and an environment for connection. Memberships provide access to simulators, with various plans available for different schedules and budgets. Bays accommodate groups with a recommended limit of four players per bay.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to cutting-edge Trackman technology for real-time ball and club data
A lively social atmosphere with a full bar and craft kitchen
Flexible booking options with per bay hourly rates and 2-hour minimums
Opportunity to play on nearly 300 virtual golf courses worldwide

food_and_drink.notes: Craft kitchen available with food service for events and general dining

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators at all locations
